instruction: Building a smiley face step by step (step 1 of 6). The canvas is empty. Add the next part: circle (cx=64, cy=64, r=48, fill #fde047, stroke #222, stroke-width 2) with id "face".
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <circle id="face" fill="#fde047" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" cx="64" cy="64" r="48" />
</svg>
